name: Lantern
description: Lantern — Serverless function performance monitoring for AWS Lambda including cold start analysis and invocation traces.

seo.title: Lantern — Performance Monitoring / APM
seo.meta_description: Lantern: Lantern — Serverless function performance monitoring for AWS Lambda including cold start analysis and invocation traces.

when_to_use: Cold start duration tracking for AWS Lambda functions
Invocation trace analysis for serverless bottlenecks
Cost attribution per Lambda function and team
Alert on memory and timeout threshold breaches

pros: Focused on AWS Lambda cold starts and performance
Faster to set up than generic APM on Lambda
cons: AWS Lambda only, no broader serverless coverage
Very narrow scope versus Datadog or Dynatrace
Overlaps with newer native AWS features
review.verdict: Niche but useful if Lambda latency is your main pain; most teams will fold this into a broader observability stack instead.
review.best_for: Teams running many Lambdas where cold starts hurt UX
review.not_for: Organizations needing APM across containers, VMs, and SaaS

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
